overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a high-speed drive through an industrial desert wasteland with solar arrays and graffiti-covered corridors, transitioning into a futuristic urban cityscape with towering skyscrapers. The convertible vehicle navigates diverse environments from open highways to narrow passages and finally into dense city traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with solar panel arrays

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the industrial highway, passing under metal overpasses between solar arrays

entered.detail: rows of photovoltaic solar panels extending into the distance on the left side
rusted metal truss overpass spanning the highway ahead
large cylindrical storage tanks visible on the right side of the road
network of pipes running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through an industrial wasteland, passing under metal overpasses with solar panel arrays lining both sides of the asphalt highway. Dust kicks up behind the convertible as it accelerates through the open desert landscape with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone with storage tanks and billboards

events.description: vehicle executes a sharp left drift turn onto the dirt shoulder, kicking up dust

agents.ego_description: drifting left around a bend in the road, navigating past large industrial storage tanks

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'TECHNICA' in green letters atop a metal structure
tall cylindrical water tower with rusted orange metal exterior
cluster of large white industrial storage silos
elevated pipeline structure crossing over the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a dense industrial area featuring large white storage tanks and a prominent TECHNICA billboard. At approximately 18 seconds, the car executes a sharp left drift turn on the dirt shoulder, kicking up a large dust cloud before continuing past a rusted water tower and under overhead pipe bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: enters narrow concrete corridor with high walls covered in colorful graffiti

agents.ego_description: speeding through the narrow graffiti-lined corridor, maintaining high velocity between concrete walls

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals on the left side
tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art on the right side
chain link fencing running along the top of the concrete walls
metal industrial walkway bridges spanning between the corridor walls overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed corridor with high concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti. The vehicle speeds through this confined industrial passage, passing under overhead metal walkways and alongside chain-link fencing, with the sky mostly blocked by the tall walls and structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland with distant city skyline

events.description: exits the narrow corridor into open desert wasteland with rocky formations
transitions from dirt terrain onto paved coastal road with streetlights

agents.ego_description: speeding across desert terrain toward the distant city skyline, then transitioning onto paved road

entered.detail: large reddish rock outcroppings and boulders in the desert landscape
futuristic city skyline with tall buildings visible on the horizon
derelict concrete buildings and ruins scattered in the wasteland
tall modern LED streetlight poles lining the road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the vehicle emerges into a vast open desert wasteland with rocky formations and abandoned structures. The distant city skyline becomes visible on the horizon. Around 55 seconds, the car transitions from dirt terrain onto a paved coastal road with modern streetlights, approaching the urban perimeter.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban downtown with skyscrapers and traffic

events.description: enters dense urban area with tall glass skyscrapers and palm-lined streets
merges into moderate traffic with other vehicles on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: navigating through city traffic at high speed, weaving between other vehicles on the palm-lined avenue

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in the right lane alongside the player
white car visible in the left lane ahead

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel skyscraper dominating the cityscape
rows of palm trees lining the urban street
large yellow construction crane visible between buildings
red and white striped traffic barriers along the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a dense futuristic urban environment with towering glass skyscrapers and palm-lined streets. The vehicle merges into moderate traffic, navigating between other cars while passing construction cranes and traffic barriers. The distant skyline is now close, with specific high-rise buildings filling the view as the car speeds through the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive that transforms from an expansive industrial wasteland into a claustrophobic, graffiti-lined urban corridor. It begins on an open asphalt highway under clear blue skies, accelerating past solar panel arrays and under metal overpasses as dust kicks up behind the convertible. As the vehicle enters a denser industrial zone, it drifts sharply across a dirt shoulder past large white storage tanks and a prominent Technica billboard before speeding under rusted pipe bridges. The scene then shifts from the open desert into a narrow enclosed passage, where the horizon vanishes behind towering concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Finally, the camera pushes through this confined space, passing under metal walkways and alongside chain-link fencing as the sky is completely blocked by the surrounding industrial structures.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle travels from a desolate industrial wasteland into the heart of a dense futuristic metropolis. It begins by emerging from a narrow corridor into a vast open desert characterized by rocky formations and abandoned structures, with a distant skyline flickering on the horizon. As the vehicle accelerates, the rugged dirt terrain transitions onto a paved coastal road lined with modern streetlights that lead toward the urban perimeter. The scene then expands into a towering urban environment of glass skyscrapers and palm-lined streets, where the car merges into moderate traffic. Finally, the view is filled by massive high-rise buildings and construction cranes as the vehicle speeds through the crowded city center.
